=== no_render_fn
# GameView with no RenderFn — fills inner area with spaces.
widget: gameview
width: 20
height: 5
===
╔══════════════════╗
║                  ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== titled
# GameView with a window title.
widget: gameview
title: Game
width: 20
height: 5
===
╔═ Game ═══════════╗
║                  ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝
